title: FestiveCraft
description: A snowy and cozy winter themed modpack
body:
FestiveCraft is a cozy modpack with numerous features that blend together to turn the world of Minecraft into a winter wonderland!

There are numerous blocks and items that help make this experience complete, from the sleds you can use to more effectively traverse the huge snowy plains, to the christmas trees and other decorations you can use to liven up your builds. 

The world is now comprised of only colder biomes, and it is always snowing, with there even occasionally being huge blizzards! While this weather is pretty, it is also dangerous, as you must manage your temperature to avoid freezing. Be sure to quickly find shelter and warmth!


*(For the world to generate as intended, go to the world generation options in the world creation menu, click on 'Customize' next to the 'Default' option, and select 'TerasWorldGen' before finally pressing 'Done' at the bottom. This will both drastically improve world generation and make it so that only cold biomes appear.)*
